OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Steven Rossi is present.
Francisco G. Torres appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Reuben Rion is present.
Salvatore Timpano representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of March 17, 2008 remains set.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
